overview: Method Functional Medicine offers testosterone replacement therapy, peptide therapy, functional medicine, and weight loss programs through personalized, root-cause approaches with advanced lab testing. Virtual consultations are available in New York, Florida, and Louisiana with medications shipped to home.
highlights: Virtual appointments in New York, Florida, and Louisiana
Advanced lab testing and personalized protocols
targetAudience: People seeking personalized functional medicine and hormone optimization for fatigue, weight management, and longevity, with specific testosterone programs for men.
